title: KODAMA
description: An egocentric scene understanding engine designed for uncontrolled environments.

title: Binary Semantic Segmentation
description: Implemented U-Net and ResNet34-based U-Net for binary semantic segmentation, trained on the Oxford-IIIT Pet Dataset to classify pets within images.

title: Gabriel9208.github.io
description: This very website! Narrowing down the vague idea of a portfolio through vibe coding to a concrete spec driven development process.

title: CG-Robot
description: A C++ OpenGL application for rendering 3D scenes with support for animation, visual effects, and a graphical user interface. The project is structured around a clear separation of application logic, rendering, scene management, and effects.

title: TexMapper3D
description: A C++ application for viewing 3D meshes and performing texture mapping and painting. Built with OpenGL for rendering and ImGui for the interface, it supports face selection, patch creation, texture mapping, and direct texture painting on meshes.

title: AI Guardian
description: A chat-based application for creating and managing AWS WAF configurations.
